title: Chapter 1: The State of Modern Racing

text_block_list.text: The history of the Twinkle Series. It is the glorious trail left behind by those who came before us.
Great achievements, prestige, legends… all are present there. If you open its history books, you'll find these utterly beautiful footprints side by side, crossing, and succeeding one another.
Countless true stories that make your heart leap with every turn of the page. And on its newest pages, someday…

One day while at work, my phone alarm went off. 
It was a calendar reminder, and the reason I had it set was…
choice_data_list: <size=32>Ah! They're handing out the student newspaper today!</size>
<size=32>Oh! They're handing out the student newspaper today!</size>

text_block_list.text:
The student newspaper is a monthly publication put together 
by the PR committee. It covers news and events around 
the academy.

Among its contents, the monthly column in particular 
was always a great read. It was the very reason I kept 
picking it up.
choice_data_list: Excuse me, I'll take a copy!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes… Here you go.
choice_data_list: Thanks, as always!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
N-No… The pleasure is mine. 
Thank you for always reading.

I eagerly flipped through the newspaper I'd received. The title 
"Idle History Talk" marked the column I was looking for.

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: Due to an injury suffered in her youth, her debut was delayed. Even after debuting, things didn't go smoothly, leading to a lackluster result in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: However, she kept running. Conquering both 2-Win and 3-Win classes, she made great strides after the Meguro Kinen and displayed her amber brilliance with a win at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: In the present day, there is a horsegirl who carries on her legacy. A late bloomer who spent a quiet spring to blossom in the fall.

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: During an interview, she murmured, "I feel like I can finally stand shoulder to shoulder with my peers — so I'm going to seize this chance."

text_block_list.name: Writer C
text_block_list.text: History has shown us already. She will soon become a figure crowned with graded stakes victories. Her story will be set in motion at the first Tokyo race of the new year. (Writer C)
choice_data_list: (Man. This column is really fascinating.)
(Yeah. This column really is fascinating.)

text_block_list.text:
It doesn't just introduce history, it ties into it by introducing 
active horsegirls too — connecting the past to the present. 
That was this column's great appeal.
choice_data_list: I wonder who the author… Writer C is?

text_block_list.text:
Muttering to myself, I checked my calendar. It looked 
like the horsegirl featured in the column was scheduled 
to race on a Friday right after the new year.
choice_data_list: I'll be free then, so maybe I should go!

text_block_list.text:
When the day arrived, I still had some time before the race, 
so I visited the Horsegirl Museum…
choice_data_list: <size=32>Ah, it's the girl who always gives me the newspaper…</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
……Their will is still connected to the present day. 
I never get tired of watching it all…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Hehe. Maybe I'll go around one more time…

After touring the Horsegirl Museum, I visited 
the paddock and found her there as well.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
choice_data_list:
(W-Wow, she's so focused on taking 
pictures of the horsegirls…)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…Hmm. I might've stopped down the lens too much. 
I'll open it up a bit more… and take a few more shots.

Next, I spotted her in the stands, clutching a sports newspaper 
she'd presumably bought this morning.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
…At 2000 meters, this course also requires explosiveness… 
But considering her last race was on the same course, and 
her closing sectional times… it won't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Her trackwork and assessments from reporters have 
been excellent… Today's favorite is… number two. 
People are starting to take notice.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Number three was also looking good in the paddock, but… 
on this track, she won't be outspurted. Plus, looking at it 
from a historical perspective…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: If she wins today, it'll be a real story.

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She has completely broken away! Number two! It's number two! 
She snatches victory with an incredible final spurt!!
choice_data_list: <size=40>Amazing! That girl featured in the column…</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Uhh… nghh…… hhgh…!

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Waaaaaah…!!
choice_data_list: (S-She's crying her eyes out…!?)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Hic, uuugh… Ah…
choice_data_list: Hey!? Are you okay!?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: S-Sorry… I didn't mean to worry you…
choice_data_list: <size=35>You sure scared me, suddenly swaying like that</size>.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm really sorry… I'm fine now. 
…This just happens sometimes. I get dizzy…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I put off eating today… I knew this would happen 
if I got too excited, but…
choice_data_list: <size=34>Then you should get something to eat right away!</size>

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: ……U-Umm. Well…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I can't do that…
choice_data_list: Err… why not?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I need to check the paddock… and the track entrances… 
So, I don't have time to eat…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I want to watch the next race closely too. 
Everything from the entrance to the actual race…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because history is born in races.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I want to be there to witness it. Not just through the data, 
but on-site. Right there in the moment, I want to experience 
that raw emotion for myself.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Because that becomes a part of my history, too.

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
W-Wait, I-I'm sorry! I kind of went on a rant there…! 
The point is, I just don't want to miss a single second 
of the races…!
choice_data_list: I-I see…

text_block_list.text:
Despite her gentle demeanor, I was taken aback by 
the sheer resolve in her voice. However, I can't leave 
her to skip a meal like this…
choice_data_list: <size=34>Ah… right. I think I have something in my pocket</size>…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Good… A perfect start. …The pace is slow, too. Just as I predicted. Now she just has to hold out… munch, munch…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Here she comes. Keep going… keep going…! ……Phew. Her pace and positioning were both perfect. A solid performance that lived up to the crowd's expectations… munch, munch…
choice_data_list: (She's multitasking like a pro…!)
(She's really multitasking like a pro…!)

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry for causing you so much trouble today…! 
Not only did you give me food… but I also showed you 
such a shameful side of myself…

…I tell her that I understand how she feels. Thinking back to 
what was written in the student newspaper's column, today's 
race truly was moving.
choice_data_list:
Did you perhaps come here after reading 
that column, too?

Did you happen to come here after reading 
that column, too?

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: …Well, I wouldn't say I read it. Umm…

text_block_list.name: PR Committee Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: I'm the one who wrote it…
